loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing load factors and current as a percentage of rated capacity — exact 'UPS capacity headroom score' is not measured, so we use load factor and current utilization as the constrained capacity reserve.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing average load factor % and current active power — headroom (kW) is omitted because the asset's rated capacity is unknown.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing output load (active power) and bypass frequency; readiness score, bypass voltage, and transfer counts are not directly measured by this asset's schema.
